title: 收敛 ledger 路径与兼容迁移（不含 doctor）
summary: Canonical ledger path converged on `.fabric/.intent-ledger.jsonl`, legacy root reads remain compatible, and non-doctor runtime/docs/tests were aligned.

title: 为 rules meta 增加 stable-id 预编译
summary: Stable rule identities are precompiled through sync-meta using leading `fab:rule-id` comments and persisted as `stable_id + identity_source`.

title: 补齐 doctor --fix 迁移链路
summary: Doctor now exposes explicit legacy-ledger detection and `--fix` migration instead of silent read-time movement.

title: 扩展 fab_plan_context 为 shared resolved bundle 视图
summary: Batch planning responses now include additive shared bundle metadata keyed by precompiled stable ids while preserving legacy per-path entries.

title: 建立 tooling manifest 与最小文档真源
summary: Tooling knowledge now has a repo-visible manifest source of truth and a companion explanation layer, with JSDoc explicitly scoped as optional future enhancement.
